importFflogs.connectionConfigError: FFLogs connection is misconfigured. Please contact the developer.
importFflogs.duplicateNotice: This fight log has already been imported
importFflogs.importFailed: Import failed. Please try again later.
importFflogs.invalidUrl: Could not recognize the FFLogs link. Please check the URL format.
importFflogs.title: Import from FFLogs
importFflogs.urlHint: Paste an FFLogs fight link or report code

importIntoTimeline.allModeWarning: "All" mode may duplicate events that already exist in the timeline. Consider using "Time range" and picking an empty stretch of time instead.
importIntoTimeline.encounterMismatch: This report's encounter does not match the current timeline's encounter
importIntoTimeline.fflogsLinkInvalid: Could not recognize the FFLogs link
importIntoTimeline.intro: This feature quickly imports the damage and action casts from another fight log into an existing timeline. Because each fight's duration and damage timing can differ, duplicate damage events and actions may appear after importing. Please review the results carefully and correct any errors manually.
importIntoTimeline.partyMismatch: This report's party composition does not match the current timeline's, so imported actions may not be assigned to the right players. Please check carefully.
importIntoTimeline.rangeInvalid: The start time must be earlier than the end time
importIntoTimeline.title: Import into current timeline
